options.value: General(non-durable): Grant decision-making authority only while mentally competent.
Durable: Grant lasting decision-making authority that remains valid even if incapacitated.

model.description: General Authority grants the Agent powers to act on your behalf in all areas, empowering them to perform any act or task you could do if you were personally present.

title.text: Select the powers you want to give your Agent

model.description: Specify any limitations on the agent's authority (e.g., spending limits, investment restrictions)

title.text: Specify the event that would terminate this Power of Attorney (Optional)
